The '''Paecian Empire''' was an interplanetary empire existing in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]<ref name="TEA" /> during the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]] era.<ref name="TCSWE" /> Considered as a great civilization,<ref name="BoS">''[[Book of Sith: Secrets from the Dark Side]]''</ref> it was founded by the [[Human/Legends|Human]] inhabitants of the world of [[Paecia/Legends|Paecia]].<ref name="TEA" /> These Paecians colonized neighboring worlds such as [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]] where they implanted a population.<ref name="BoS" /> The Paecian Empire collapsed around [[3000 BBY]]<ref name="TCoPL" /> but its legacy remained very strong over the centuries.<ref name="Despoilers" /><ref name="TCoPL" /><ref name="BoS" /> Three thousands years after its fall, the [[Paecian/Legends|Paecian]] language was still spoken on Dathomir.<ref name="TEA" />

The elite soldiers who defended the Paecian Empire were named the [[Kaarenth Impaler]]s. Millennia after the collapse of the empire, they were still renowned as unyieldingly faithful warriors.<ref name="Despoilers" />
